name: punch-character-motion
description: Verify punch input drives a visible full-body pose on modern AnimationConstraint rigs and legacy Motor6D rigs, recovers cleanly, and honors Motion Feedback off.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=1,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,CritChance=0,SettingsJSON=game:GetService("HttpService"):JSONEncode({motion=true,sound=true,uiScale=1})}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) return true

steps.label: prepare a valid Brick Wall punch

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local joint for _,d in ipairs(p.Character:GetDescendants()) do if (d:IsA("Motor6D") or d:IsA("AnimationConstraint")) and (d.Name=="RightShoulder" or d.Name=="Right Shoulder") then joint=d break end end assert(joint,"right shoulder joint missing") local before=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0 g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("Punch") task.wait(1.1) local maxAngle=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchAppliedMaxAngle") or 0 local maxPosition=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchAppliedMaxOffset") or 0 local peak=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionPeak") or 0 local active=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionActive") local dramatic=maxAngle>1 and maxAngle<=math.pi and maxPosition>1.2 and maxPosition<2.2 and peak>.9 and not active return H:JSONEncode({class=joint.ClassName,rig=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchRig"),count=(g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0)-before,peak=peak,maxAngle=maxAngle,maxPosition=maxPosition,active=active,dramatic=dramatic})

steps.label: punch produces and recovers a visible character pose

args.code: local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local snapshot=g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("SetSettings",{motion=false,sound=true,uiScale=1,persist=false}) return snapshot and snapshot.motion==false

local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("SetSettings",{motion=false,sound=true,uiScale=1,persist=false}) local before=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0 g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("Punch") task.wait(.25) local result=H:JSONEncode({count=(g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchCount") or 0)-before,suppressed=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionSuppressed"),active=g:GetAttribute("CharacterPunchMotionActive")}) g.PunchWallClientAutomation:Invoke("SetSettings",{motion=true,sound=true,uiScale=1,persist=false}) return result
